positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a glowing neon constellation forming a mythical phoenix taking flight. The phoenix is rendered in clean, thick-line silhouettes with gradients of electric blue, magenta, and gold. It is set against a minimalist, dark cosmic background sprinkled with geometric celestial dust particles. The composition is perfectly centered, creating a strong, symmetrical focal point suitable for apparel printing. The style is 'Neo-Art Deco' meets 'Vaporwave Mythology,' utilizing extreme contrast and glowing edge-lighting (rim lighting). The visual flow should guide the eye through the wings and tail feathers. High detail, vector art quality, intricate patterns, smooth rendering, highly saturated colors.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, logo, signature, watermark, disfigured, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, cartoonish, realistic photograph, photorealism, poor contrast, grayscale
